# Office Staff

![](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2025/05/4.11-Liz-Rohly0050-Edit-scaled-e1746403824177-150x150.jpeg)Liz is often the first point of contact for our valued clients and happily serves as a trusted guide. She assists clients with navigating our variety of services, our onboarding/ scheduling processes, and transitioning as needed between providers/services. Liz works diligently behind the scenes to keep things running smoothly for our dedicated providers and Change-Well overall. ( [Read More)](https://www.change-well.com/our-staff/)

* * *

![](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2025/05/4.11-Liz-Rohly0017-Edit-scaled-e1746403603403-150x150.jpg)Daisy, is our Practice Manager at Change-Well. She has several years of experience working in mental health clinics and a deep understanding of what it takes to effectively oversee the many aspects of a successful private practice. Daisy’s strong management/ leadership skills, compassionate nature, and commitment to excellence,  is vital to the success of Change-Well.  ( [Read More)](https://www.change-well.com/daisy-pratice-manager/)

* * *

![Bio- Saloni, Clinical Assistant](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2025/08/Cropped-Pic-of-Saloni-150x150.jpg)Saloni is psychology student with a deep passion for understanding human behavior and mental processes. She plans to contribute to the field through both clinical practice and scholarly research, with the ultimate aim of making a meaningful difference in people’s lives. We are happy to have her working as a Clinical Assistant. ( [Read More)](https://www.change-well.com/saloni-clinical-assistant/)

* * *

## Footer

![Change-Well.com](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2020/02/Change-Well-Logo-White-01.png)

Find help in person or through teletherapy (video conferencing) for Depression, Anxiety or Fears, ADHD and other mental health diagnoses, Relationship and Marriage Counseling, Trauma and PTSD, Couples Therapy, Family Therapy, High Conflict Divorce, Individuals Recovering from Parental Alienation, and Life Transitions, for healthier living, better balance and overall wellness. Obtain an accurate diagnosis/diagnosis clarification, a psychological report or assessment for upcoming surgery or for your prescribing physician or psychiatrist.

* * *

[Privacy & Terms](https://www.change-well.com/terms/)

### Testing, Therapy and Training

Clinical Psychologist and Therapist:

MAIN OFFICE: 5048 Tennyson Parkway, Suite #110
• Plano, Texas • 75024

BRANCH OFFICE: 13785 Research Blvd, Suite #125 • Austin, Texas • 78750

FAX Number: 512-949-4920

Teletherapist, Therapy, Testing, Diagnosing, Psychological Evaluations and Assessments.

[![Dr. Diann Sanford, Traditional Therapist and Teletherapist](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/themes/App/Assets/images/therapist_badge.png)](https://www.therapytribe.com/listing/dr-diann-sanford-therapist-plano-texas-united-states-75093/)[![Dr. Diann Sanford verified by GoodTherapy.org](https://www.goodtherapy.org/graph/seals/verified_seal4.png)](https://www.goodtherapy.org/therapists/profile/diann-sanford-20200229)[Diann Sanford](https://www.psychologytoday.com/profile/266155 "Diann Sanford")
